1.name: Dampening
1.description: The character can hinder the flow of kinetic energy affecting him, reducing the damage of any such attacks directed against him.
references: WOD : Outcasts: A Players Guide to Pariahs , p. 37

2.name: Redirection
2.description: The character can alter the course of moving objects. Thus, bullets can be made to veer away from the character, sometimes even reversing course by up to 180 degrees.
references: WOD : Outcasts: A Players Guide to Pariahs , p. 37

3.name: Vengeful Strike
3.description: The character is able to focus kinetic energy as a weapon. Any attack that successfully strikes the character may be refocused to add to the character’s own hand-to-hand attacks.
references: WOD : Outcasts: A Players Guide to Pariahs , p. 38

4.name: Discharge
4.description: The character can enhance the kinetic energy she generates herself. She may apply this to ranged attacks.
references: WOD : Outcasts: A Players Guide to Pariahs , p. 38

5.name: Kinetic Shield
5.description: The character creates a barrier of kinetic energy in front of her, which may be used to protect herself or and one else behind the barrier from assaults.
references: WOD : Outcasts: A Players Guide to Pariahs , p. 39
